joinDescription: Break every limit. Enter the global ultimate arena — forged for lifters who demand elite data and iron will.
joinDescriptionFromLadder: Unlock the global ladder · face the strongest across the field
joinDescriptionFromBackup: Enable cloud sync · defend your training legacy
compareProStrategy: Peak score uploads · arena performance tracking
proFeatureLeaderboard: Live global ladder — unlock multi-metric boards with near-instant rank sync.
proFeatureCloudSync: Unlimited cloud escort — armor your training history in a permanent secure vault.
proFeatureArena: Advanced upload strategy — lock in your best marks and calibrate peak output anytime.
restoreSuccess: Arena access restored — ready to re-enter the ladder.
restoreEmpty: No Pro record found on this device to restore.
identityRequired: Sign in with Google to bind your cross-device arena identity.
googleLoginFail: Complete Google sign-in to continue. Allow pop-ups if the window doesn't appear.
billingUnavailable: Subscription channel is offline. Please try again shortly.
betaOpenAccess: Beta active: leaderboard open to all users.
identityOptionalBeta: Beta: no subscription required. Google sign-in still required for leaderboard.
betaNoLoginNeeded: No subscription in beta (Google sign-in required)
subscribeSuccess: Pro channel opening — heading to ladder.
coreRequired: Unlock Core before you can link the Arena.
disclaimer: Test-base comms mode is active. At launch, billing connects through official App Store / Google Play verification to protect your account.
coreGateBody: Unlock Core first — assessment, radar, and history stay on-device without Arena fees.
